Title: Login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the login page of the Sauce Demi Web Application.
Steps: 1. Enter a valid username in the username field. 2. Enter a valid password in the password field. 3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Login with invalid username
Preconditions: User is on the login page of the Sauce Demi Web Application.
Steps: 1. Enter an invalid username in the username field. 2. Enter a valid password in the password field. 3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Login with invalid password
Preconditions: User is on the login page of the Sauce Demi Web Application.
Steps: 1. Enter a valid username in the username field. 2. Enter an invalid password in the password field. 3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Login with both fields empty
Preconditions: User is on the login page of the Sauce Demi Web Application.
Steps: 1. Leave the username and password fields empty. 2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that both fields are required.

Title: Login button is disabled with empty fields
Preconditions: User is on the login page of the Sauce Demi Web Application.
Steps: 1. Leave the username and password fields empty. 2. Observe the state of the login button.
Expected Result: The login button is disabled until valid credentials are entered.
